summary: Backend regression sweep for admin video upload endpoints. All 12 pytest cases pass + bonus 200MB chunked upload manual test also passes. No 500 errors observed under any tested scenario (happy path, edge cases, auth failures).

tests_executed.TestChunkedUpload::test_full_chunked_flo: PASS - init+12x5MB chunks+finalize -> 200, cloud URL, upload_sessions/upload_chunks cleaned from MongoDB
tests_executed.TestWorkshopWithUploadedVideo::test_crea: PASS - POST /api/admin/workshops with uploaded video_url, status=completed -> 200
tests_executed.TestFileServing::test_get_file_with_rang: PASS - Range: bytes=0-1023 -> 206 with Content-Range header, 1024 bytes
tests_executed.MANUAL::200MB_chunked_upload: PASS - init+40x5MB chunks+finalize -> 200, cloud URL, size=209715200

critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/admin.py is 11,715 lines - should be split into domain-specific route modules (workshops, uploads, drills, etc.). Extremely hard to maintain.
The `active_uploads = {}` module-level dict (line 6314) is unused dead code now that chunks are persisted in MongoDB - should be removed.

Chunked upload stores entire reassembled file in memory (combined_data in finalize). For 2GB files this will consume 2GB RAM per concurrent upload. Consider streaming assembly to temp file and then uploading to cloud storage.
base64 encoding of chunks in MongoDB inflates storage by ~33%. Consider GridFS for chunk storage.
No expiry/TTL index on `upload_sessions` or `upload_chunks` collections - orphaned sessions (from failed/abandoned uploads) will accumulate indefinitely.
seed_data_creation: Test workshop created (prefixed TEST_Workshop_Upload) and auto-deleted in teardown. Uploaded TEST_ files remain in cloud storage (gradnext/recordings/*.mp4) - small impact only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin upload endpoints (direct + chunked) and /api/files serving are fully green. The new pytest suite in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_video_upload.py covers all scenarios including cleanup verification. Note: test file produces leftover TEST_ files in cloud storage (recordings folder) - not cleaned by test.
rca of the issue: Unable to reproduce the reported 'Status 500 on direct video upload' from Admin dashboard. Tested 2MB direct, 60MB chunked, 200MB chunked, missing-chunks, invalid upload_id, and unauthorized scenarios - every call returned the expected 2xx/4xx status, never 500. Likely root causes for the original report: (a) transient cloud_storage_service failure now stabilized (the init lazily creates storage key on first call), (b) user hit the 50MB threshold where frontend switches to chunked flow causing confusion, or (c) intermittent network/storage timeout. Recommend main agent consider this issue resolved and monitor logs for any future 500 occurrences.
